query: SELECT t.id as taskId, t.instanceId, t.stageId, t.status as taskStatus, t.assignedTo, i.status as instanceStatus, i.requestId, r.status as requestStatus, r.requestNumber FROM approvalTasks t INNER JOIN approvalInstances i ON t.instanceId = i.id INNER JOIN requests r ON i.requestId = r.id WHERE t.status = 'pending' AND i.status != 'in_progress' ORDER BY t.id;
